story.text: As bdo, I want Causality's home to be a living experience I can open and play — and one that tells the truth about itself and refuses to quietly get worse. The cute three-word story ('the cat naps') still grows through ONE Complexity slider into ontum's own running loop, but the surface now carries three things v0 did not: it reads its own realness from the log (the .mock stages glow magenta because admissions.jsonl says they are mock — the honest-witness, not a hardcoded skin), it GENERATES its relations by composition instead of lifting them from a seed, and the bake-off is folded IN as a compare LENS over the one living mesh rather than a separate fork. I shape and steer by gesture (hold a node to COMMAND it, lasso a region to GATHER a real cited context package, draw or slash an edge to move the REAL recovery score), and a change-management policy node now refuses any candidate surface that lost a pinned invariant — so the experience can only get richer, never quietly poorer.

briefing.headline: The Causality experience — the charades winner, folded into one honest, self-witnessing, regression-guarded surface
briefing.value: The home surface of epic.causality-surface as it now stands, the next version of the bake-off work (supersedes atom.causality-experience.v0). experience.html opens on a cute nucleus and one Complexity slider grows it word -> scored phrase (the real recovery_scorer, the surface_trap shown) -> networked corpus -> the real ontum loop. Beyond v0 it adds: (1) the honest-witness — realness is read live from .ai-native/log/admissions.jsonl so a stage is magenta because the log says it is mock, never because code says so (AIM invariant I1); (2) generative relations — edge labels come from canvas-system.js composeRelation, designed from text, not lifted from the seed (iterations 0008/0013); (3) the compare LENS — the bake-off divergence (compare.js: robust vs divergent across independent readings, crowning nothing, D-2) overlaid ON the one living mesh rather than a forked compare.html; (4) the change-management policy node (change_policy.js) — a real gate that judges a candidate surface held / amplified / regressed against the pinned exemplar invariants and refuses a regression (exit 2), born catching compare.html forking feature-poor.
briefing.why_now: bdo named the regression directly — a good surface quietly losing what it had (compare.html dropped the slider/skin/gestures) — and that became the change_policy node: the missing sensor between the shame beat (senses stalling) and retro (senses churn). The comparator/synthesis (compare.js) answers 'the seed was not robustly sourced' — truth is what survives multiple independent witnesses, not one authored seed. The AIM pattern was named and formalized (iterations 0013) and the scored-variations compose/accept/dismiss surface began (iterations 0014). The v0 atom is byte-identical on main, orphaned and never judged; this v1 brings the work as it actually stands onto the log as a fresh content-hash identity the value-gate can judge.
briefing.if_accepted: Causality's home is the dish bdo can play AND trust: the nucleus->slider->loop growth, the gesture loop, the live recovery score, the honest magenta-from-the-log, the generated relations, and the in-place compare lens all reach the deployed Pages URL as one surface; the change-policy node stands as a real regression gate the next surface change is judged against; the AIM pattern (iterations 0013) has a playable artifact, not just words.
briefing.if_rejected: The evolved experience and its honest-witness / compare-lens / regression-guard stay behind localhost the one judge with taste cannot open (the 'seeing loop was broken' failure that stalled the canvas before it was served); the bake-off and AIM-formalization spend yields nothing bdo can touch, and the regression the change-policy node was born to catch has no standing guard.
briefing.cost_of_wrong_call: Low: experience.html, exp-*.html, compare.js and change_policy.js are static preview surfaces and pure judges that reuse committed engine files (canvas.js / canvas-system.js / recovery_scorer.js) and the committed phrases.json benchmark; they add no runtime, the log never depends on them (experience.html only READS admissions.jsonl, never writes it), and retiring a candidate or the lens deletes a file nothing else references. change_policy.js has its own §10 teeth (change_policy.test.js, compare.test.js).
briefing.mechanism: experience.html + exp-naturalist.js, reusing the real engine (window.Causality.canvas, S.node/S.link, the node types, GLYPH, water-fills, pulses) with no reimplemented drawing. Complexity grows the same mesh at every scale; relations are GENERATED by composeRelation (canvas-system.js); realness is folded from a fetch of ../.ai-native/log/admissions.jsonl (no node_real -> magenta); recovery_scorer.js scores recovery live so a draw/slash moves a true score; the compare lens overlays compare.js's robust/divergent fold on the living mesh only in the 'cat' regime. change_policy.js is the regression gate: it loads the DON'T-REGRESS invariants from change-policy.invariants.json (shared registry, browser-safe inline fallback) and judges baseline vs candidate as held / amplified / regressed, a CLI guard exiting 2 on a regression (the hooks/*.py convention). The four exp-<chef>.html candidates remain the bake-off record. Cream-only, on-canvas, static server, no build step.

_note: v1 birth record for the Causality experience surface. Supersedes v0 (byte-identical on main, orphaned, never judged) with a new content-hash identity that restarts the pipeline, describing the work as it now stands: the honest-witness (realness read from the log), generative relations, the compare lens folded into the one mesh, and the change-management policy node (a real regression gate). Authored to bring the served home-surface work onto the log as a unit the loop can judge and land (the off-log-gate discipline). Never mutated; current verdicts are the fold over .ai-native/log/ (D-5).
